name: the universal semantic detector judges an arbitrary inline rule body against arbitrary content as a violation
command: printf 'const r = eval(x);\n' > app.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule any-rule --body "code must never call eval" --forbid "eval(" --paths app.js 2>e.txt; grep -q 'status=red violations=1' e.txt && echo prose-judge-inline-violates 1>&2
